description: 信息建筑派。字体即语言，网格即思想。瑞士网格系统，极致克制。
base_style_prompt: Swiss grid system. Information architecture focused. One accent color only. Whitespace 60%, content 30%, accent 10%. Black section labels as design elements (INSIGHT, PART 03). 2px black border cards. Horizontal divider lines. Data visualization embedded seamlessly.
path_note: Path A exclusive (HTML→PPTX). Requires precise typography and grid system.
philosophy: 字体即语言，网格即思想。用极度克制的设计让数据和内容自己说话。
